testcase.name: testGlobalIdInHeaders

testcase.name: testAvroJSON
testTopicIdStrategyAutoRegister
testRecordIdStrategydFindLatest
testReflectAutoRegister

apicurio.registry.artifact-resolver-strategy=io.apicurio.registry.serde.strategy.TopicIdStrategy, value.serializer=io.apicurio.registry.serde.avro.AvroKafkaSerializer, request.timeout.ms=5000, acks=all, bootstrap.servers=PLAINTEXT://localhost:32769, connections.max.idle.ms=10000, key.serializer=org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringSerializer, apicurio.registry.avro-datum-provider=io.apicurio.registry.serde.avro.ReflectAvroDatumProvider, client.id=Producer-topic-544979a1_9fda_4bf5_b3a9_3e8597db6dd7} 2026-04+00-28 15:29:58 INFO
